definitions.text: The caudal appendage of an animal that is attached to their posterior and near the anus or cloaca.
examples: Most primates have a tail and fangs.

definitions.text: An object or part of an object resembling a tail in shape, such as the thongs on a cat-o'-nine-tails; a strand of material hanging from something.
To hold by the end; said of a timber when it rests upon a wall or other support; with in or into
To swing with the stern in a certain direction; said of a vessel at anchor.
To follow or hang to, like a tail; to be attached closely to, as that which can not be evaded.
Limitation of inheritance to certain heirs.
